sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: F.N.B. Corp. expands public finance offerings
feed.summary: F.N.B. Corp. has expanded its public finance offerings through its broker-dealer subsidiary, FNB America Securities LLC, by adding municipal bond underwriting services. This new service will help the company better serve municipal clients by providing essential capital for their financing needs, leveraging FNB's data analysis capabilities. This strategic addition enhances FNB's Capital Markets offerings and reinforces its commitment to businesses and municipalities throughout its operating regions.

feed.title: Baxter (BAX) Unveils New IV Verify Line Labeling System for Nurs
feed.summary: Baxter International (BAX) has launched its new IV Verify Line Labeling System at the 2026 American Organization for Nursing Leadership Conference. Developed in partnership with Vigilant Software, this system aims to enhance nursing workflow efficiency and patient safety. While the company's financial health presents a mixed picture with declining margins and significant leverage, its market valuation suggests the stock may be trading near historical lows.

feed.title: First Solar says it’s looking to be part of the solution in powering data centers
feed.summary: First Solar is actively positioning itself to provide solar power solutions for data centers, indicating a strategic move into the energy-intensive data industry. The company aims to address the significant power demands of data centers with its renewable energy technology. This initiative reflects a broader trend of technology infrastructure seeking sustainable energy sources.

feed.title: RBC Capital Reiterates Outperform Rating on VRSK with $230 Price Target | VRSK Stock News
feed.summary: RBC Capital has reiterated its Outperform rating on Verisk Analytics (VRSK), maintaining a price target of $230.00 USD. This decision, led by analyst Ashish Sabadra, reflects a stable outlook for the data and analytics provider. Verisk, a key player in the property-casualty insurance sector, has recently seen mixed analyst sentiments, with some firms raising price targets while others made adjustments.

feed.title: FDA Clears Boston Scientific's (BSX) Asurys Fluid Management Sys
feed.summary: Boston Scientific (BSX) has received FDA approval for its Asurys Fluid Management System, designed for endoscopic urologic procedures, bolstering its product portfolio. The company demonstrates strong financial health with consistent revenue growth and expanding margins, and its valuation metrics suggest it is trading near historical lows. Despite insider selling, analyst sentiment is positive, and the company exhibits low bankruptcy risk, though sector-specific challenges remain.

feed.title: Aptiv (APTV): Barclays Lowers Price Target; Maintains Overweight Rating | APTV Stock News
feed.summary: Barclays has lowered its price target for Aptiv (APTV) from $105.00 to $77.00 but maintained an 'Overweight' rating. This revision comes despite other firms like UBS and Oppenheimer recently upgrading or increasing price targets for APTV. Aptiv, an industrial technology company, focuses on automated, electrified, and digitalized futures, with an average target price from 20 analysts at $99.27, suggesting a potential upside of 48.96%.

feed.title: LYV: Citizens Initiates Coverage with Market Outperform Rating
feed.summary: Citizens has initiated coverage on Live Nation Entertainment (LYV) with a "Market Outperform" rating and a price target of $190 USD. This new coverage follows other recent analyst actions, including Goldman Sachs maintaining a "Buy" and Rothschild & Co upgrading to "Buy," both with increased price targets. Live Nation, a global leader in live entertainment, shows an average target price of $181.75 from 23 analysts, implying a 22.23% upside from its current price, although GuruFocus estimates a 6.46% downside based on its GF Value.

feed.title: MNST: Deutsche Bank Lowers Price Target, Maintains Buy Rating | MNST Stock News
feed.summary: Deutsche Bank analyst Steve Powers has lowered the price target for Monster Beverage (MNST) from $94.00 to $90.00 but maintained a Buy rating. This adjustment follows similar movements by other analysts, reflecting a cautious yet optimistic outlook on the stock. Despite the lowered target, the average analyst forecast still suggests a significant upside from the current MNST price.

feed.title: LW: Deutsche Bank Maintains Hold, Lowers Price Target to $40
feed.summary: Deutsche Bank has maintained a Hold rating for Lamb Weston Holdings (LW) but lowered its price target from $46.00 to $40.00, indicating a cautious near-term outlook. This follows several other analysts who also lowered their price targets for the frozen potato product producer in late 2025 and early 2026. Despite the lowered target, the average analyst forecast suggests a potential upside of 31.65% from its current price, and GuruFocus estimates a significant upside based on its fair value calculation.

feed.title: Flowers Foods (FLO): Deutsche Bank Lowers Price Target to $7 | F
feed.summary: Deutsche Bank has lowered its price target for Flowers Foods (FLO) from $11 to $7, while maintaining a "Hold" rating. This adjustment reflects a 36.36% decrease in the projected target, following similar reductions by other analysts over the past year. Despite the lowered targets, the average analyst forecast still implies an upside from the current price, and GuruFocus estimates a significantly higher fair value for the stock.

feed.title: Kimberly-Clark (KMB) Rating Maintained, Price Target Lowered by Deutsche Bank | KMB Stock News
feed.summary: Deutsche Bank analyst Stephen Powers maintained a "Hold" rating on Kimberly-Clark (KMB) and lowered the price target from $110.00 to $109.00. This adjustment represents a 0.91% decrease in the price target. The article also provides an overview of historical analyst ratings for KMB and details about Kimberly-Clark's product portfolio and market presence.

feed.title: XCEL ENERGY (NYSE: XEL) director gets 615 stock units in lieu of cash
feed.summary: XCEL ENERGY INC director Megan D. Burkhart received 614.675 stock equivalent units as part of her compensation, bringing her total direct holdings to 20,854.328 common shares-equivalent. These units serve as an equity-based retainer, with 512.229 units granted at $78.09 each in lieu of a quarterly cash retainer and an additional 102.446 units given as a 20% premium. Her holdings also include units accumulated through reinvested dividend equivalents, aligning her compensation with the company's stock performance.

feed.title: CVS launches new ‘pharmacy-only’ store – and 19 more are in the pipeline
feed.summary: CVS Health has launched a new "pharmacy-only" store format in Chicago, aiming to provide easier access to pharmacy care and health services. This initiative follows several years of store closures for the company. At least 19 more of these smaller-format locations are planned for cities across the United States, focusing solely on medications, immunizations, and pharmacist consultations rather than a broad retail selection.

feed.title: TER: Baird Maintains Outperform Rating, Raises Price Target to $332 | TER Stock News
feed.summary: Baird's Richard Eastman has reiterated an Outperform rating for Teradyne (TER) and increased the price target to $332 from $305, an 8.85% jump. This follows several other analysts who also raised their price targets for TER in early February 2026. Teradyne provides automated test equipment for semiconductors and other systems, with Wall Street analysts forecasting an average target price of $314.51 for the stock.

feed.title: Netflix eyes bigger NFL package with more live games -- report (NFLX:NASDAQ)
feed.summary: Netflix is reportedly looking to significantly expand its National Football League content by securing a four-game package. This potential deal would include a Thanksgiving Eve game and an international game, doubling its current NFL coverage. The move comes as Netflix's current NFL package is set to expire.

feed.title: NFL taps American Express for ticket presales, Draft and Super Bowl perks
feed.summary: American Express has become the official payments partner of the NFL in a multi-year global deal starting with the 2026 NFL season. This partnership will give American Express Card Members access to ticket presales, exclusive on-site experiences, and special offers at major NFL events, including the Super Bowl, NFL Draft, and International Games. Additionally, a new NFL Extra Points American Express Credit Card will be introduced later this year, offering fans rewards and access to unique NFL experiences.

feed.title: American Express Named the Official Payments Partner of the National Football League
feed.summary: American Express has partnered with the National Football League (NFL) as its official payments partner, starting with the 2026 NFL season. This multi-year global partnership will provide American Express Card Members with exclusive benefits, including ticket presales, on-site experiences, and special offers at major NFL events like the Draft and Super Bowl, as well as international games. The collaboration aims to enhance fan engagement globally and includes the upcoming launch of the NFL Extra Points American Express® Credit Card.

feed.title: Ero posts formal report for its Brazil copper-gold project study
feed.summary: Ero Copper (TSX: ERO, NYSE: ERO) has filed a Technical Report supporting the Preliminary Economic Assessment (PEA) for its Furnas Copper-Gold Project in Brazil. This report, prepared in accordance with NI 43-101 standards, formalizes and supports the PEA disclosure previously released on February 23, 2026. The document is available on the company's website, SEDAR+, and will also be filed on EDGAR.

feed.title: Elevance Health to Hold Conference Call and Webcast to Discuss First Quarter 2026 Results on April 22, 2026
feed.summary: Elevance Health will host a conference call and webcast on April 22, 2026, at 8:30 a.m. EDT, to discuss its first quarter 2026 financial results, which will be released at 6:00 a.m. EDT on the same day. A webcast replay will be available until May 22, 2026. The company serves approximately 104 million consumers and aims to improve health as a trusted partner.

feed.title: T-Mobile confirms new layoffs after February job cuts
feed.summary: T-Mobile has confirmed new layoffs following previous job cuts made in February. Despite these reductions, the telecommunications company states it is still investing in and hiring for areas crucial to growth and innovation. This news comes after multiple cuts by the company over the past year.

feed.title: Robbins LLP Urges IT Stockholders Who Lost Money Investing in Gartner, Inc. to Contact the Firm for Information About Leading the Class Action
feed.summary: Robbins LLP is urging stockholders of Gartner, Inc. (NYSE: IT) who lost money investing in the company between February 4, 2025, and February 2, 2026, to contact the firm regarding a class action lawsuit. The lawsuit alleges that Gartner misled investors about its growth and projected revenue, specifically concerning its contract value growth and consultant revenue targets. Investors have until May 18, 2026, to submit papers to the court to serve as a lead plaintiff.

feed.title: Invesco EQV European Equity Fund's Strategic Move: Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co Ltd ...
feed.summary: The Invesco EQV European Equity Fund has detailed its Q1 2026 portfolio adjustments, highlighting significant strategic moves. The fund notably added Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co Ltd (TPE:2330) as its largest new buy, alongside increasing stakes in companies like Contemporary Amperex Technology Co Ltd (HKSE:03750). Conversely, it fully exited nine holdings, including Prosus NV (XAMS:PRX), and reduced positions in 35 stocks, such as Alibaba Group Holding Ltd (HKSE:09988), reflecting a dynamic rebalancing focused on European growth opportunities.

feed.title: M&T Bank authorizes $5 billion stock buyback program
feed.summary: M&T Bank Corporation announced a new $5.0 billion stock buyback program, replacing a previous $4.0 billion program. The repurchases will be at M&T's discretion through open market or privately negotiated transactions. This follows a strong financial performance in 2025 with $2.88 billion in earnings and a maintained 'Outperform' rating from RBC Capital, which raised its price target to $220.00.

feed.title: Freeport-McMoRan (NYSE:FCX) Shares Down 2.9% on Analyst Downgrade
feed.summary: Freeport-McMoRan (NYSE:FCX) shares dropped 2.9% after UBS Group lowered its price target from $70.00 to $66.00, though still maintaining a "buy" rating. Despite the downgrade, the company maintains a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating with an average price target of $62.40 from analysts. The stock had positive quarterly earnings results and announced a dividend, but saw significant insider selling totaling over $35.8 million in the past 90 days.

feed.title: JPMorgan Loses Bid to Dismiss Wells Fargo Lawsuit
feed.summary: A U.S. federal judge has denied JPMorgan Chase's motion to dismiss a lawsuit brought by Wells Fargo regarding a defaulted $481 million commercial real estate loan. Wells Fargo, acting as trustee for investors, alleges that JPMorgan was aware of a default event by Chetrit Group, the borrower, concerning an overstatement of property income before the loan was finalized, but still proceeded with the loan. The lawsuit seeks to recover losses for investors, with Wells Fargo contending that JPMorgan ignored this critical information to secure millions in fees and should repurchase the loan or pay damages.

feed.title: Tesla’s Robotaxi service found a home in this East Bay city
feed.summary: Tesla's Robotaxi ride-hailing service has established a new hub in downtown Oakland, utilizing the parking garage of the recently completed 1900 Broadway apartment tower by Behring Companies. This marks the second such location in the East Bay for Tesla's service, which launched in the Bay Area last year.

feed.title: Advanced Energy, FTAI Aviation, Astronics, EMCOR, and Dycom Stocks Trade Down, What You Need To Know
feed.summary: Shares of Advanced Energy (AEIS), FTAI Aviation (FTAI), Astronics (ATRO), EMCOR (EME), and Dycom (DY) fell in afternoon trading following President Trump's threat to "completely obliterate" Iran's energy infrastructure, specifically the critical Kharg Island hub which handles 90% of Iran's crude exports. This escalating geopolitical rhetoric has increased fears of an energy supply shock, leading to market reactions and a flight to safety. Dycom, in particular, was down 4.8% on the day and 6.4% year-to-date, reflecting market concerns over higher inflation and a potential economic slowdown impacting cyclical sectors.

feed.title: Coca-Cola Company (KO) Price Forecast: Momentum Builds After Pullback
feed.summary: Coca-Cola Company (KO) shares are showing signs of increased demand after a recent pullback found strong support near a confluence of technical indicators, including its 20-week moving average and a previous resistance zone. This suggests the stock's bull trend remains intact, with improving momentum indicated by a steeper trendline. While prior breakouts have seen only one leg up, the current setup offers potential for a sustained rally beyond previous highs, contingent on continued strength and a new high being reached.

feed.title: Seagate Technology (STX): JP Morgan Initiates Coverage with Overweight Rating | STX Stock News
feed.summary: JP Morgan has initiated coverage on Seagate Technology (STX) with an Overweight rating and a price target of $525.00 USD. This adds to recent positive analyst sentiment for the company, following several price target increases from other firms in February and January 2026. While the average analyst target suggests an upside of 30.51% from the current price, GuruFocus' estimated GF Value indicates a potential downside of 52.95%, suggesting varying perspectives on the stock's fair value.

feed.title: Chevron Corporation Stock Hits New 52-Week High on Analyst Upgrades Amid Surging Oil Prices
feed.summary: Chevron Corporation (CVX) shares reached a new 52-week high of $213.36 on March 30, 2026, driven by analyst upgrades and surging oil prices. Morgan Stanley upgraded the stock to overweight with a $212 price target, while other firms like UBS, Raymond James, and HSBC also raised their targets due to factors like LNG tightness, geopolitical tensions, and the Hess integration. The company continues to offer dividend reliability, with a 3.4% yield and 39 consecutive annual increases, amidst strategic growth projects and a strong market position.

feed.title: Corning, Ameresco, Gates Industrial Corporation, Lennar, and Enphase Shares Are Falling, What You Need To Know
feed.summary: Shares of Corning, Ameresco, Gates Industrial Corporation, Lennar, and Enphase Energy fell following President Trump's threat to "completely obliterate" Iran's energy infrastructure, specifically Kharg Island, which handles 90% of Iran's crude exports. This rhetoric caused a market flight to safety, impacting several stocks. Despite the recent dips, the article notes that such market overreactions can present buying opportunities for high-quality stocks.

feed.title: Bristol Myers Squibb adding 3 medications on TrumpRx
feed.summary: Bristol Myers Squibb is adding three of its medications—Sotyktu, Zeposia, and Orencia SC—to TrumpRx.gov, offering discounts of 40% to 90% off retail prices. This move follows tariff pressure from President Donald Trump, aiming to reduce prescription drug costs for Americans. Other major drug companies like Amgen and GSK have also joined the platform, offering significant discounts on their medications.

feed.title: NFL Kicks Off New Mega-Deal With American Express, Replacing Visa
feed.summary: American Express has signed a mega-deal with the NFL, becoming the league's official credit card partner. This agreement marks a significant shift as American Express replaces Visa in this capacity. The new partnership highlights American Express's commitment to sports sponsorships.

feed.title: Forgent Power Solutions Announces Closing of Public Offering of Class A Common Stock and Full Exercise of Underwriters’ Option to Purchase Additional Shares
feed.summary: Forgent Power Solutions, Inc. announced the closing of its public offering of Class A common stock, including the full exercise of the underwriters' option to purchase additional shares. The offering involved shares sold by both parent entities controlled by Neos Partners, LP and by Forgent itself, at a price of $29.50 per share. Forgent did not receive proceeds from the shares sold by the Selling Stockholders but used its net proceeds to redeem interests in an operating subsidiary.

feed.title: FTHM: 2025 revenue rose 25% to $420.5M, with improved margins and narrowed net loss
feed.summary: Fathom Holdings Inc. (FTHM) reported a 25% increase in revenue to $420.5 million in 2025, driven by acquisitions and ancillary services. The company also saw improved margins and a narrowed net loss year-over-year, prioritizing operational efficiency. This information is based on an SEC 8-K Current Report filed on March 30, 2026.

feed.title: Verizon wins injunction against T-Mobile over 'false' savings claim (VZ:NYSE)
feed.summary: A district court judge has granted a preliminary injunction to Verizon, preventing T-Mobile from airing an advertisement. The ad allegedly makes "false" claims about savings for consumers switching from Verizon's Unlimited Ultimate Plan to T-Mobile's service. This legal action targets potentially misleading advertising practices in the competitive telecommunications market.

feed.title: Regency Centers plans April 29 earnings release, April 30 call
feed.summary: Regency Centers (NASDAQ: REG) is scheduled to release its first-quarter 2026 earnings after market close on April 29, 2026. The company will then host a conference call to discuss the results on April 30, 2026, at 11:00 a.m. ET. Investors can access the earnings release, supplemental package, and webcast replay via the company's Investor Relations website.

feed.title: IT Investor Alert: Gartner, Inc. Securities Fraud Lawsuit - Investors With Losses May Seek to Lead the Class Action After Allegedly Concealing CV Growth Deterioration: Levi & Korsinsky
feed.summary: Levi & Korsinsky, LLP encourages investors who suffered losses in Gartner, Inc. (NYSE: IT) between February 4, 2025, and February 2, 2026, to contact the firm. The lawsuit alleges that Gartner concealed the deterioration of its Research CV growth, which management had initially projected to accelerate. Key events include a significant drop in CV growth to 5% by August 2025 and a further decline to 1% by February 2026, contradicting earlier positive assurances and leading to substantial stock price drops.

feed.title: The Walt Disney Company Stock: Navigating Entertainment Shifts and Investor Opportunities in a Strea
feed.summary: The Walt Disney Company (NYSE:DIS) is navigating the evolving entertainment landscape by focusing on its diversified portfolio, including entertainment studios, ESPN, and theme parks. Strategic pivots towards streaming profitability, resilience in its park division, and leveraging its vast intellectual property are key to its sustained investor interest. Despite competitive pressures and market shifts, analysts lean positive on Disney's growth potential due to its core strengths and adaptability.

feed.title: Builders FirstSource Data Breach Exposes Health Information for Individuals
feed.summary: Builders FirstSource Flex Plan, an entity connected to Builders FirstSource Inc., reported a data breach impacting 1,514 individuals to the U.S. Department of Health and Human Services on February 18, 2026. This breach, involving protected health information, was preceded by a dark web claim from a threat actor known as Leaknet on December 30, 2025, who alleged possession of Builders FirstSource data. Affected individuals are advised to monitor health insurance statements, credit reports, and be wary of phishing attempts and medical identity theft.

feed.title: FactSet backs Finster as it rolls out AI tools for investment banks
feed.summary: FactSet has announced a strategic partnership with Finster AI, including an investment, to power its new AI-native platform for banking workflows. This collaboration aims to automate deal processes and synthesize insights for financial institutions, with a private preview already launched and broader availability expected throughout 2026. The move aligns with FactSet's recent focus on AI innovation and follows several other AI-related initiatives from the company.

feed.title: Blackstone closes $6.3B fund for life sciences investing
feed.summary: Blackstone has announced the closing of its latest life sciences private fund, securing $6.3 billion, making it the largest ever raised in the sector and nearly 40% larger than its predecessor. This fund is part of the Blackstone Life Sciences (BXLS) platform, which manages $15 billion in assets and has a strong track record of successful pharmaceutical and device approvals. The firm continues to make significant investments in biopharma, including recent deals with Teva Pharmaceutical, Merck & Co., and Johnson & Johnson, underscoring the growing private equity interest in healthcare and life sciences.

feed.title: Humana Inc. to Release First Quarter 2026 Results on April 29, 2026
feed.summary: Humana Inc. (NYSE: HUM) announced it will release its first-quarter 2026 financial results, along with prepared management remarks, at 6:00 a.m. Eastern time on April 29, 2026. The company will also host a live question-and-answer session at 8:00 a.m. Eastern time that morning to discuss the results and earnings guidance for 2026. A webcast of the earnings call and the news release will be available on Humana's Investor Relations page.

feed.title: Ford, GM take steps to boost truck production
feed.summary: Ford Motor Co. has canceled summer shutdowns at its four F-Series pickup truck plants and General Motors Co. is adding a production day at its Flint heavy-duty truck plant to boost truck production. Ford aims to make up for lost volume due to an aluminum shortage, while GM is responding to demand despite higher fuel prices. These actions are intended to increase manufacturing output amidst supply chain issues and strong market demand.

feed.title: Advanced Turf Solutions, Corteva name Ohio company as Ultimate Sweepstakes winner
feed.summary: Advanced Turf Solutions and Corteva have announced Augusta Lawn Care of Van Wert, Ohio, as the winner of The Ultimate Sweepstakes. This contest awarded Augusta Lawn Care a new Steel Green Manufacturing spreader/sprayer, with the team selecting the SG52 model. The sweepstakes took place during the 2025 early order season and rewarded customer commitment through registration for Corteva’s Ultimate Rewards Early Order Program or purchases of qualifying products.

feed.title: Why the Second Half of 2026 Could Be Huge for AMD Stock
feed.summary: AMD stock experienced a decline this year after a strong performance in 2025, but the second half of 2026 could see a significant turnaround. This potential rally is attributed to the upcoming launch of the company's Helios AI rack and expected revenue generation from its new MI450 chip, which could accelerate growth and attract investors. While the stock currently trades at a high forward price-to-earnings multiple, increased growth and stronger margins from new AI chip sales could make its valuation more appealing.

feed.title: Humana Inc. to Release First Quarter 2026 Results on April 29, 2026
feed.summary: Humana Inc. (NYSE: HUM) announced it will release its first-quarter 2026 financial results, including prepared management remarks, at 6:00 a.m. Eastern time on April 29, 2026. The company will also host a live question-and-answer session at 8:00 a.m. EDT to discuss the results and earnings guidance for the year, accessible via webcast on their Investor Relations page. Financial measures not in accordance with GAAP will be reconciled in the earnings news release, available on their website.

feed.title: Why the Second Half of 2026 Could Be Huge for AMD Stock
feed.summary: AMD stock has declined by 8% this year despite a robust 77% gain in 2025, and its current growth rate of over 30% may not be enough to justify its $320 billion valuation. However, the second half of 2026 presents potential catalysts, including the launch of its Helios AI rack and revenue ramp-up from the new MI450 chip, which could accelerate its growth and attract investors. While the stock's forward price-to-earnings multiple of 30 is high, increased growth and stronger margins from its AI chips could make its valuation more attractive.

feed.title: Two BNY Mellon municipal bond funds set identical April payouts
feed.summary: BNY Mellon Investment Adviser, Inc. announced that two of its municipal bond closed-end funds, BNY Mellon Strategic Municipal Bond Fund, Inc. (DSM) and BNY Mellon Strategic Municipals, Inc. (LEO), have declared monthly distributions of $0.026 per share for April. These distributions are payable on April 30, 2026, to shareholders of record on April 14, 2026, with an ex-dividend date also on April 14, 2026. The announcement emphasizes that the payouts remain unchanged from the prior month.

feed.title: Devon Energy’s Gaspar sees good things ahead, stemming from his first year and the imminent merger with Coterra Energy – Oil & Gas 360
feed.summary: Devon Energy President & CEO Clay Gaspar discussed his first year in the role, his operating philosophy, and the impact of the upcoming merger with Coterra Energy at CERAWeek 2026. He highlighted Devon's focus on sustainable free cash flow and the strategic rationale behind the Coterra merger, emphasizing asset fit and potential synergies. Gaspar also stressed the growing importance of AI in optimizing operations and driving future value for the combined entity.
